title: Poshan Tracker
description: Own and build the backend of the Government of India's nationwide nutrition platform — 300+ REST APIs across 10+ microservices serving millions of beneficiaries.
fullDescription: Poshan Tracker is the Government of India's nationwide nutrition-governance platform (Ministry of Women & Child Development), serving millions of beneficiaries and a recipient of the Prime Minister's Award for Excellence in Public Administration 2024. I build and own its backend — 300+ REST APIs across 10+ independently deployable services — and led the monolith-to-microservices migration, the move to DynamoDB for high-throughput records, and the ABDM/ABHA national health-system integration. Performance work on hot paths brought API responses under 200ms with ~40% lower server load, on a stack kept current and reliable with Jenkins CI/CD, SonarQube quality gates, and Dockerized services on AWS.

architectureNotes.detail: Decomposed a monolith into 10+ independently deployable services so releases stay fast and low-risk as public usage grows — 300+ REST APIs in production.
Moved core stores to DynamoDB for millions of low-latency records, with Redis caching on hot paths to hold sub-200ms responses and ~40% lower server load under heavy traffic.
Shipped the ABDM/ABHA modules (M1, M2, M3, Bal ABHA) and connected the platform to APISETU, UPSC, DigiLocker, and NAD.
Jenkins CI/CD, SonarQube quality gates, and Dockerized services on EC2/ECS sustaining 99.9% uptime on mission-critical workflows.

title: Portfolio Website
description: Built a fast, searchable portfolio experience that presents my work clearly while keeping content easy to update through structured data.
fullDescription: Created a responsive portfolio that combines strong visual storytelling with developer-friendly content management. By structuring the content in JSON and rendering it into static HTML, the site remains easy to maintain while still offering a polished experience for recruiters, crawlers, and visitors. The result is a reliable personal brand presence that performs well across devices and remains simple to evolve over time.

architectureNotes.detail: Structured content as JSON and rendered it into static HTML so the site stays simple to maintain while remaining fast and predictable.
Kept the experience lightweight and cache-friendly to ensure quick loads and strong perceived performance for visitors and crawlers.
Separated content, templates, and styling so updates can be made safely without rewriting the front-end experience.

title: XIRR Calculator
description: Secure financial tool that computes XIRR returns from uploaded Excel workbooks — Newton-Raphson and bisection solvers, in-memory processing, and no persistence of financial data.
fullDescription: A production-grade web app that computes XIRR returns from irregular cash flows in uploaded Excel transaction workbooks. It parses the workbooks with Apache POI and solves for the rate using Newton-Raphson with a bisection fallback for reliable convergence, processing everything in memory and never persisting the financial data. The application is hardened for real use: Spring Security role-based access control, BCrypt password hashing, email-verified password reset, rate limiting, and an admin user-management panel, backed by PostgreSQL (Neon) and shipped as a Dockerized deployment on Render.

architectureNotes.detail: Computes XIRR from irregular Excel cash flows (parsed with Apache POI) using Newton-Raphson with a bisection fallback so the solver converges reliably across edge cases.
Processes uploaded financial workbooks entirely in memory and never persists them, keeping the sensitive-data footprint minimal.
Spring Security role-based access, BCrypt password hashing, email-verified password reset, rate limiting, and an admin user-management panel.
PostgreSQL on Neon with a Dockerized deployment on Render.

title: DigiBot
description: Built a local-first RAG chatbot that answers DigiLocker questions from an indexed knowledge base, running entirely offline with no cloud LLM calls.
fullDescription: DigiBot answers questions about DigiLocker document issuers and FAQs entirely from a local knowledge base. On first run it embeds the FAQ and issuer records with Sentence Transformers and indexes them in FAISS; each query retrieves the closest matches, filters out anything past a distance threshold, and feeds the surviving context to a local Mistral 7B model served by Ollama — no API keys, no cloud LLM. Responses stream back with the source titles they were drawn from, and the model is instructed to reply 'OUT OF SCOPE' rather than guess when the retrieved context doesn't cover the question.

architectureNotes.detail: Runs Mistral 7B via Ollama entirely on-device, so the assistant works fully offline with no API keys and no cloud dependency.
Retrieved matches are filtered by an L2 distance threshold before reaching the model, and the system prompt requires an 'OUT OF SCOPE' reply when the context doesn't cover the question.
The FAISS index and source documents are built once from the DigiLocker FAQ and issuer data, then cached to disk and reloaded instantly on later runs.

title: NFC Payment Application
description: Explored secure mobile payments through NFC, focusing on trust, authentication, and safe user transactions in a real-world interaction model.
fullDescription: Developed a research-oriented Android application that demonstrates how contactless payment interactions can be built with strong security controls. The project focused on encrypted communication, user authentication, and transaction validation so the experience stayed practical while reflecting real security concerns in mobile payments. It showcases a strong foundation in secure application design and mobile engineering.

architectureNotes.detail: Built the experience around encrypted communication, strong authentication, and transaction validation to reflect real payment security concerns.
Used a modular structure to separate payment logic, authentication, and NFC communication so the design stayed understandable and maintainable.

title: Elite Creative Group
description: Delivered a polished digital presence for a creative agency, improving how the brand presented its work and services online.
fullDescription: Built a responsive business website that helped a creative agency communicate its identity more effectively. The project focused on a modern experience with clear navigation, engaging visuals, and a strong presentation of services and portfolio work. The result was a more professional online presence that made the brand easier to understand and more compelling to prospective clients.

architectureNotes.detail: Designed the experience around clear navigation, stronger content hierarchy, and a more persuasive presentation of services and work.
Kept the implementation simple and maintainable while still creating a polished, modern experience for a client-facing brand.
